Welcome to Acme Cloud

Serverless infrastructure that scales with your team — from prototype to production.

Start Free Trial

Built for small teams

Acme Cloud removes the operational overhead of running production services so small teams can focus on shipping product.

Globally distributed

Edge functions running in 30 regions; every request gets the closest node automatically.

Transparent pricing

No surprise bills — pay for what you use, with a generous free tier for hobby projects.
